name: 传说之始
short_description: "TheBeginningOfLegend" is a Diablo like game where you can freely combine your understanding of equipment, skills, and runes to build your own exclusive BD, and through your own efforts, grow from an unknown person to a legendary character who saves the world.
detailed_description:
System Overview
No level, no profession, all equipment and skills are available for use. You can freely match equipment, skills, and soul enhancement to create your own style!
200+pieces of equipment
70+skills
100+Monsters
Having a relatively complete equipment enhancement system, mission system, exchange system, rune system, and soul enhancement system

QQ group
[Legend begins] Guide the Jiangshan Group 106958350
